_authoring_notes: FSI Offers Section 6 — ROI navy callout. Single-statement section.
Closing-line text lifted verbatim from RE Pros 03-tiers Alliance copy: 'One additional closing per year more than covers the cost of membership.'
Navy full-width band, centered text, gold THE MATH eyebrow.
Sub-statement contextualizes the math without weakening the headline.

settings.html:
The Math

One additional closing per year more than covers the cost of membership.

At average commission rates, the math is the same whether the deal comes from a cash-offer follow-up, a website visitor you identified, or a listing conversation where you had the property data first.
